query: SELECT grade, COUNT(*) as total_students, SUM(score) as total_score, AVG(score) as avg_score FROM students GROUP BY grade ORDER BY FIELD(grade, 'أول', 'ثاني', 'ثالث', 'رابع', 'خامس', 'سادس');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35xPkBa73Yuiy4A.root --database kcQuJzmxhkjxjyE5pHTEwG --execute SELECT grade, COUNT(*) as total_students, SUM(score) as total_score, AVG(score) as avg_score FROM students GROUP BY grade ORDER BY FIELD(grade, 'أول', 'ثاني', 'ثالث', 'رابع', 'خامس', 'سادس');
